description: Single source of truth for palettes used by skill-build-educational-site and skill-style-guide. Both skills read this file rather than hard-coding hex values in their respective SKILL.md files, so a palette change happens in one place and stays consistent across both skills.

personal-style.summary: James Buckett's personal style. Light theme with dark-mode toggle, exactly one restrained accent. Owned by skill-style-guide. Used by skill-build-educational-site when composing with skill-style-guide (the default for any page shared through normal channels).

standalone-jpmc.summary: Conservative enterprise palette for one-off external deliverables. Used by skill-build-educational-site when NOT composing with skill-style-guide (e.g. a page going to a regulator or stakeholder outside the user's normal context). Light-only; no dark-mode toggle ships with standalone pages.

selection_rule: When composing skill-build-educational-site with skill-style-guide (the usual case), read the 'personal-style' palette. When skill-build-educational-site runs standalone, read 'standalone-jpmc'. The composition rule lives in each skill's SKILL.md; this file only holds the values.
